title: [phase:replan] [family:create-checkout-session-stale] [provider_hint:codex] We deployed customer-portal and stripe-webhook successfully, but create-checkout-session still serves the old contract (Email is required, CORS cursorvers.com) and its version stayed at 169. Infer the most likely reason and...
summary_text: - Most likely reason: `create-checkout-session` was never updated on the target Supabase project. In this workspace, the new contract is only in the current local file set, and `git status` shows [`supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts) is still uncommitted; if the deploy came from `main`/CI, it would keep serving the old bundle. `version 169` not moving is consistent with “not actually deployed”. - The old behavior itself is strong evidence of a stale artifact, not a runtime env issue: current code does not require `email` in the request body and current shared CORS does not hardcode `cursorvers.com`, so if you still see both, you are hitting an older deployed function or the wrong project ref for that one function. - Safest next action: do not change code yet; first verify the exact Supabase project ref and redeploy only `create-checkout-session` from the same workspace/branch you used for `customer-portal` and `stripe-webhook`, then confirm two things immediately after deploy: the function version increments above `169`, and a direct request shows the new contract/CORS.
